headline: Raymond James Maintains Outperform on SLB, Lowers Price Target to $61
summary: Raymond James  analyst James Rollyson   maintains SLB (NYSE:SLB) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $62 to $61.

headline: Broadening Market Lifts Moat Stocks In June
summary: The S&P 500 declined 0.95% as market leadership rotated away from mega-cap tech. Read more here.
